overview: SRI RAJESWARI OILS AND FOODS (SR Oils And Foods) is a business product showcase and ordering website. Customers can browse a public product catalog, view detailed product pages, add items to a shopping cart, and place orders. The business owner can manage products, fulfil orders, and display the shop address with a map for customers.
features: Public product catalog with search, category filtering, and sorting
Product detail pages with images and full descriptions
Shopping cart with quantity controls and checkout form
Customer accounts with order history via Internet Identity login
Owner dashboard for order management and status updates
Owner product management (add, edit, remove, upload images)
Customer care information and feedback submission
Shop address display with map and address lines
Owner shop settings to manage store location and contact info
